title: centaurea pugioniformis
intro: Centaurea pugioniformis, also known as the spiny knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant is known for its spiny foliage and purple flowers, which can be used for medicinal purposes. Centaurea pugioniformis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
